chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3714 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.16148/2024 2. For hearing of main case 07.04.2025 Mr. Hamza Waheed, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ahmed, Assistant Attorney General Learned Assistant Attorney General waives notice. It is jointly stated that this lis is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court reported as 2020 PTD 1742, therefore, in application of the reasoning so assigned this petition may also be dismissed. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
